channel.title: SPL - Ballard Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Ballard Branch

item.title: Toddler Play Group
item.description:
Saturday, April 11, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

A drop-in play group for toddlers and their families.

Event details

item.title: Game on! Board Games for All Ages
item.description:
Sunday, April 12, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

Calling all board gamers. Join us and play a game or two.

Event details

item.title: Teen Arts & Crafts: Earth Day
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

Join us to create an Earth Day craft!

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Bilingual Toddler Story Time / Hora de cuentos bilingüe para niños pequeños
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room / Sala de reuniones

At Bilingual Toddler Story Time, kids ages 1-3 and their families can enjoy songs, stories, and music.Program in English and Spanish.--------------------------------------------Durante la hora de cuentos, los niños de 1 a 3 años y sus familias pueden disfrutar de canciones, cuentos y música.Evento en inglés y español.

Event details

item.title: Weekly Movie
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 1:30 PM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for a movie and popcorn!

Event details

item.title: Poetry Potluck
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

Join our informal gathering to read aloud and listen to poems by writers throughout the world and across time.

Event details

item.title: Community Health Access Program Drop-in
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Ballard Branch

Join the Community Health Access Program for in-person drop-in services at the Ballard Branch each month.

Event details

item.title: Toddler Play Group
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 10 AM

item.title: Game On for Teens! Role-playing game (RPG)
item.description:
